message:
fix(types): align cancel token budget tests with priority max semantics

Update two test assertions in cancel.rs to match the budget priority
semiring fix (commit 8195e9a1) that changed Budget::meet from min to
max for the priority field:

- combined_budget_honors_all_constraints: assert combined.priority >=
  user_budget.priority (was <=) with updated log message
- Token with shutdown budget: assert with_shutdown.priority >=
  combined.priority (was <=) with updated log message

These tests verify that when cancel tokens combine budgets, the more
urgent (higher numeric) priority propagates correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
